title: Run nileshtrivedi/activitypub-testsuite against smallhold
description: Insomnia HTTP collection (github.com/nileshtrivedi/activitypub-testsuite) with test cases validated against Mastodon, Pleroma, GoToSocial, Pixelfed. Import collection, set env vars to our server, run all requests, fix any that fail.
close_reason: Mastodon API compat: 61/61 endpoints PASS across all categories (instance, accounts, statuses, timelines, notifications, search, lists, filters, tags, OAuth)
